name: security
description: Security domain ontology — threats, vulnerabilities, controls, threat actors, campaigns, indicators of compromise, malware, supply-chain risk, policies, and assessments, grounded in MITRE ATT&CK/CAPEC, CVE/CWE/NVD, NIST 800-53/OSCAL/800-161r1, STIX 2.1, OWASP, and VERIS.
